title: cantaloupe
body:
![i dare you](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/101d8279e7bca8bdfdc095c44623d71943098eaf_0.webp)

This mod adds :
- a new keybind

yeah thats _it_, all it adds is a simple keybind...  
 but this keybind does something... _interesting_

**(PLEASE HELP THE CANTALUOPE GODS ARE HOLDING ME HOSTAGE AND IM NOT ALLOWED TO TELL WHAT THE MOD DOES)**


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

(_Actually_ i am able to tell what this mod does **cause the modrith moderators are getting mad at me**, anyways the keybind make a white screen appear that hides the crosshair and inventory and makes some music (un copyrighted) play, and at the drop a low quality cantaluope appears which **after 30 seconds** crashes the game unless cancelled by pressing the keybind again. this also being a joke from the youtuber **Yahiamice**)

</details>
